remedy.notes: Fifth Circuit Feb 18, 2026 final order: $2,500 sanction on appellate counsel Heather Hersh under inherent power; district-court counsel Shawn Jaffer Rule 11/$1927 sanctions vacated by separate order. Both Casetext/CoCounsel and vLex named as candidate products; Hersh admitted AI use when asked directly.
